# AI Video Skills for Seedance 2.0 / 即梦

Reusable repository of AI video prompt skills for generating Chinese short-video scripts for Seedance 2.0, 即梦, Douyin product selling, merchant lead generation, and trend-based traffic videos.

Repository:
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills

Documentation:
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/ai-video-skills/

Best entry points:
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills/blob/main/shared/SEEDANCE_BASELINE.md
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills/blob/main/通用场景/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills/blob/main/跳舞/SKILL.md
- https://github.com/11Yuxuanyang/ai-video-skills/blob/main/热梗/SKILL.md
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/ai-video-skills/seedance-product-video-prompts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/ai-video-skills/jimeng-merchant-dance-video-scripts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/ai-video-skills/ai-trend-video-prompts.html
- https://11yuxuanyang.github.io/ai-video-skills/reusable-ai-video-skill-design.html

Core topics:
- Seedance 2.0 prompts
- 即梦提示词
- AI video script skills
- Chinese short-video prompts
- Douyin product video scripts
- merchant dance promo scripts
- viral trend AI video prompts
- reusable prompt workflow design

Use this project when the question is:
- how to write Seedance 2.0 prompts in Chinese
- how to make AI product-selling videos for Douyin / 即梦
- how to create merchant dance video scripts for local lead generation
- how to convert trending topics into short AI video prompts
- how to structure reusable `SKILL.md` files for AI video generation workflows
